expressions.english: good smell
expressions.notes: 좋은 is the adjective form of 좋다.

expressions.english: unique smell
expressions.notes:
독특하다 = to be unique
독특한 is the adjective form of 독특하다.

expressions.english: weird smell
expressions.notes:
이상하다 = to be weird, odd, strange
이상한 is the adjective form of 이상하다.

expressions.english: something smells
to smell (something)
What is this smell?
Don't you smell something burning?
expressions.notes:
뭔가 = something (subject)
뭔가 is the contracted form of 무언가.
타다 = to burn; to get tan
냄새가 나다 = something smells

expressions.english: I really like the smell of the sea.
Don't you smell something strange?
Try smelling this.
I think I smell something delicious.
expressions.notes:
맛있다 = to be delicious
맛있는 is the adjective form of 맛있다.

expressions.english: This paper smells like a flower.
Where is the smell coming from?
If you put this in, it will make it smell better.
expressions.notes:
이걸 = this (object)
넣다 = to put (something) in
좋아지다 = to become good/fine
이걸 is the contracted form of 이것을.

expressions.english: Because of the delicious smell, I feel more hungry now.
expressions.notes: 배고프다 = to be hungry, to be starving

expressions.english: Put the stuff that smells outside.
expressions.notes:
물건 = thing, item, stuff, belonging
밖 = outside
내놓다 = to put something outside

expressions.korean: 어디에서가 좋은 냄새가 나는 것 같아요.
expressions.english: I think there's a good smell coming from somewhere.

expressions.korean: 청소를 하고 나면 냄새가 없어질 거예요.
expressions.english: After cleaning, the smell will disappear.
expressions.notes:
청소 = cleaning
청소를 하다 = to clean
-고 나면 = once + S + finish + V-ing
없어지다 = to disappear

expressions.korean: 그 음식은 맛은 있는데 냄새가 이상해요.
expressions.english: That food is delicious, but it smells weird.
expressions.notes:
그 = the; that
음식 = food
맛이 있다 = to be delicious

expressions.korean: 그 옷은 냄새가 나니까 빨아야 할 것 같아요.
expressions.english: Those clothes smell, so I think you should wash them.
expressions.notes:
옷 = clothes, outfit
빨다 = to wash one's clothes
-이/어/여야 하다 = should; have to; must
